title: Welcome to your new site
excerpt: Your site is ready — here's what you can do with it.
body:
This is your first post. Feel free to edit it, delete it, or start fresh — it's all yours.

Use the editor toolbar to add **bold text**, *italics*, headings, images, and more. When you're happy with your post, click **Publish** to share it with the world.

title: Getting started with Forja
excerpt: A quick tour of the key features that make Forja powerful.
body:
Forja is a modern content management system designed for speed and flexibility.

## Key Features

- **Rich Editor** — Write with a block-based editor that supports headings, images, code blocks, and more
- **Categories & Tags** — Organize your content with a flexible taxonomy system
- **Multi-language** — Publish content in multiple languages with built-in localization
- **Media Library** — Upload and manage images, documents, and other files

## Next Steps

1. Edit this post to make it your own
2. Create your first original post
3. Set up your site navigation

title: Your first real post (delete me)
excerpt: A blank canvas ready for your ideas.
body:
Replace this text with your own content. What will you write about?

Tip: Use the `/` key to insert blocks like headings, images, and quotes.
